threats.title: Why Secure Data Movement Is the Zero Trust Bottleneck Nobody Talks About
threats.summary: Every security program is betting on the same assumption: once a system is connected, the problem is solved. Open a ticket, stand up a gateway, push the data through. Done. threats.title: After Mythos: New Playbooks For a Zero-Window Era
threats.summary: When patching isn’t fast enough, NDR helps contain the next era of threats. If you’ve been tracking advancements in AI, you know the exploit window, the short buffer that organizations relied on to patch and protect after a vulnerability disclosure, is closing fast.
